hotels.name: The Azure Meridian
hotels.description: A refined coastal retreat with panoramic sea views, curated dining, and effortless access to Nice's iconic promenade.

hotels.name: Villa Ethereal Waters
hotels.description: A serene hillside villa with private terraces and sunset views over Santorini's caldera—crafted for slow luxury.

hotels.name: Harbor View Penthouse
hotels.description: A modern penthouse escape in the heart of Marina Bay with skyline views, thoughtful design, and premium service.

hotels.name: Desert Rose Riad
hotels.description: A historic Moroccan riad transformed into a tranquil luxury haven with a central fountain courtyard and rooftop terrace.

hotels.name: The Kyoto Forest Retreat
hotels.description: A traditional ryokan nestled among ancient bamboo groves, offering kaiseki dining, onsen baths, and serene garden views.

hotels.name: Peaks & Pines Alpine Lodge
hotels.description: An exclusive ski lodge with direct piste access, roaring fireplaces, and panoramic views of the Swiss Alps.

hotels.name: Bali Serenity Villas
hotels.description: Lush jungle villas with private infinity pools overlooking Ubud's sacred rice terraces — the ultimate Bali escape.

hotels.name: The Manhattan Grand
hotels.description: A landmark New York hotel with Central Park views, a rooftop bar, and timeless Art Deco interiors steps from Fifth Avenue.

hotels.name: Cape Point Clifftop Hotel
hotels.description: Perched on Cape Town's dramatic coastline with 180° Atlantic views, a world-class cellar, and private beach access.

hotels.name: Maldives Overwater Sanctuary
hotels.description: Overwater bungalows rising above the clearest lagoon on earth — where coral gardens glow beneath your glass floor.

hotels.name: The Parisian Loft
hotels.description: A chic boutique hotel in the heart of Le Marais — haussmann stone facades, exposed beams, and curated Parisian art.

hotels.name: Amalfi Coast Cliffside Hotel
hotels.description: Clinging to the cliffs of Positano, this legendary hotel blends painted tiles, bougainvillea, and cerulean sea views.

hotels.name: The Bangkok Riverside
hotels.description: A grand riverside property with its own pier, golden temple views, and the finest rooftop pool in Bangkok.

hotels.name: Dolomites Sky Chalet
hotels.description: A postcard-perfect mountain chalet with stone fireplaces, panoramic Dolomite peaks, and a celebrated wine cellar.

hotels.name: Havana Heritage Hotel
hotels.description: A lovingly restored colonial mansion in Habana Vieja with live salsa, classic cars, and a rooftop overlooking the Malecón.

hotels.name: Rajasthan Palace Hotel
hotels.description: A magnificent palace-turned-hotel on the shores of Lake Pichola, with hand-painted frescoes, royal suites, and a rooftop with sunset dhow rides.

hotels.name: The Sydney Harbour Lights
hotels.description: Iconic harbour-front hotel where every room frames the Opera House and Harbour Bridge — the most recognisable view in Australia.

hotels.name: Petra Sands Desert Camp
hotels.description: Luxury tented camp in the rose-red desert of Wadi Rum — sleep under a billion stars in transparent bubble domes.

hotels.name: Rio Beachfront Palace
hotels.description: Brazil's most glamorous address — right on Ipanema with Sugarloaf views, a rooftop infinity pool, and world-class caipirinha bar.

hotels.name: Northern Lights Ice Lodge
hotels.description: Glass-roofed aurora cabins deep in the Finnish wilderness — fall asleep to the northern lights dancing above your bed.

hotels.name: The Lisbon Garden Hotel
hotels.description: A stylish boutique hotel in Chiado with an acclaimed rooftop bar, artisan breakfast, and panoramic views of the Tagus River.

hotels.name: Dubai Skyline Tower
hotels.description: At the foot of Burj Khalifa, this ultra-modern tower hotel merges high-tech luxury with Dubai's electric skyline.

hotels.name: Tulum Jungle Cenote Resort
hotels.description: Eco-luxury cabanas hidden in the Tulum jungle, each with a private outdoor shower, hammock, and access to a private cenote.

hotels.name: The Reykjavik Geothermal Spa Hotel
hotels.description: A design-forward Reykjavik hotel with geothermal spa pools, lava stone interiors, and Northern Lights excursion desk.

hotels.name: Vienna Palais Grand
hotels.description: A grand Habsburg-era palace hotel steps from St. Stephen's Cathedral, with gilded ballrooms and a legendary pastry chef.

hotels.name: Petra Cliffside Lodge
hotels.description: Perched above the ancient rose-red city, this lodge offers morning views of the Treasury and expert local guides.

hotels.name: Phuket Pearl Beach Resort
hotels.description: A lavish beach resort on Phuket's most pristine bay, with Thai pavilion dining, overwater bar, and a beach butler.

hotels.name: Barcelona Harbour Arc
hotels.description: A sleek waterfront hotel at Barcelona's yacht harbour with Sagrada Família views from the upper floors and Michelin dining.

hotels.name: Serengeti Tented Camp
hotels.description: An ultra-luxury mobile camp at the heart of the Great Migration — wake to elephants grazing at your tent flap.

hotels.name: Colosseum View Boutique
hotels.description: Terrazza rooms with direct Colosseum views, a rooftop aperitivo bar, and breakfast served on the ancient city's rooftops.

hotels.name: The Cochin Spice Heritage
hotels.description: A Portuguese colonial mansion restored into a fragrant heritage hotel — courtyard gardens, Ayurvedic spa, and backwater views.

hotels.name: Machu Picchu Cloud Forest Inn
hotels.description: The closest luxury hotel to Machu Picchu — suspended in the cloud forest, with early ruins access before the crowds arrive.

hotels.name: The Marrakech Jardin Secret
hotels.description: Hidden behind ancient medina walls, this riad opens onto a historic Islamic garden with fountain-fed orange groves.

hotels.name: The Honolulu Breeze
hotels.description: A breezy Waikiki classic with direct beach access, Diamond Head views, and the world's best luau right on the lawn.

hotels.name: Oslo Fjord Design Hotel
hotels.description: A Scandinavian design masterpiece on Oslo's waterfront — minimal pine interiors, Viking museum access, and fjord breakfast.

hotels.name: Zanzibar Spice Island Resort
hotels.description: A Swahili-style beachfront resort on Zanzibar's powder-white coast, with dhow sunset cruises and a celebrity chef.

hotels.name: The Hong Kong Harbour Grand
hotels.description: Kowloon's most celebrated harbour hotel — the Symphony of Lights is visible from every room, and dim sum is exceptional.

hotels.name: Queenstown Lake's Edge Lodge
hotels.description: A lakeside lodge with the Remarkables mountain range as a backdrop — bungee jump at dawn, wine tasting at dusk.

hotels.name: The Mumbai Sea Deck
hotels.description: On the famed Queen's Necklace, this art deco icon overlooks the Arabian Sea with legendary sunset views and Bollywood glamour.

hotels.name: The Cappadocia Cave Hotel
hotels.description: Carved into the volcanic tufa cliffs of Göreme, these cave suites offer a dawn hot-air balloon panorama that defines bucket-list travel.

hotels.name: Seychelles Coral Nest
hotels.description: A private island resort on the whitest beach in the world — granite boulders, turquoise coves, and zero other guests.

hotels.name: The Goa Spice Garden
hotels.description: A breezy boutique resort in North Goa with frangipani gardens, a beach-shack style pool bar, and legendary Sunday market access.

hotels.name: Amsterdam Canal Suite
hotels.description: A converted 17th-century canal merchant house with creaky wooden staircases, Rembrandt prints, and breakfast on a floating terrace.

hotels.name: Tuscany Vineyard Estate
hotels.description: A 14th-century stone estate surrounded by vine rows, olive groves, and cypress trees — Chianti pours freely at sunset.

hotels.name: The Seoul Hanok Guesthouse
hotels.description: A beautifully restored Joseon-era hanok with ondol heated floors, a bonsai garden, and a private tea ceremony room.

hotels.name: The Prague Old Town Manor
hotels.description: A Baroque manor in Prague's fairy-tale old town — vaulted cellars, candlelit Czech dining, and the Astronomical Clock from your window.

hotels.name: Agadir Ocean Club
hotels.description: The go-to surf resort on Morocco's Atlantic coast — board rentals, expert guides, yoga at sunrise, and the freshest tagine after.

hotels.name: The Jaipur Palace Haveli
hotels.description: A Rajput royal haveli with mirrored rooms, elephant processions at breakfast, and a rooftop with views over Amer Fort.

hotels.name: The Medellin Treetop Hotel
hotels.description: A contemporary jungle hotel in Medellín's coolest barrio — treetop terraces, cable-car views, and the best craft cocktails in Colombia.

hotels.name: The Valletta Grand Harbour Hotel
hotels.description: A restored Baroque palazzo in Europe's smallest capital — limestone-arched rooms with Grand Harbour views and Knights of Malta history.
